residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 346-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: Nitrilase-like Cys/Glu/Lys active-site pattern mapped onto the ProteinGym AMIE target sequence, with AF2 geometry sanity check from data/proteingym/structures/AMIE_PSEAE.pdb.
evidence: In the ProteinGym AF2 structure, Cys166 is spatially close to Glu59 and Lys134. Heavy-atom distances from Cys166 are approximately 3.44 A to Glu59 and 4.21 A to Lys134. These residues define a conservative exact active-site slice for the first AMIE benchmark.
